name: Broccoli Orrechiette
recipeIngredient: orrechiette pasta (or any other type is fine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the mushrooms by sautéing them in vegetable broth and red wine for approximately 10 minutes.
2. Add minced garlic to taste (using about 2 cloves).
3. Once the mushrooms are cooked, add more vegetable broth and broccoli rabe, then cover and steam until wilted.
4. Incorporate white beans and red pepper to taste.
5. Add the pasta and serve!
